---
title: "quarto-liveurl"
---

A Quarto Reveal.js extension for attaching and viewing live URLs during presentations.

## Examples

- [Core Features](example.qmd) — single URL, multiple URLs, launcher, no-URL slides
- [Sticky & Global URL](example-sticky.qmd) — persistent panel across slide transitions
- [Paper Summary](example-paper.qmd) — "Attention Is All You Need" with the full paper open in the panel
